mapper.insert: INSERT INTO banner (banner_name, banner_size, bg_color, link_url, banner_position, image_path, sort_order, start_datetime, end_datetime, use_yn, reg_date) VALUES (#{bannerName}, #{bannerSize}, #{bgColor}, #{linkUrl}, #{bannerPosition}, #{imagePath}, #{sortOrder}, #{startDatetime}, #{endDatetime}, #{useYn}, #{regDate})
mapper.select: SELECT banner_no AS bannerNo, banner_name AS bannerName, banner_size AS bannerSize, bg_color AS bgColor, link_url AS linkUrl, banner_position AS bannerPosition, image_path AS imagePath, sort_order AS sortOrder, start_datetime AS startDatetime, end_datetime AS endDatetime, use_yn AS useYn, reg_date AS regDate FROM banner WHERE banner_position = 'TOP' AND use_yn = 'Y' AND (start_datetime IS NULL OR start_datetime <= NOW()) AND (end_datetime IS NULL OR end_datetime >= NOW()) ORDER BY sort_order ASC, banner_no DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT banner_no AS bannerNo, banner_name AS bannerName, banner_size AS bannerSize, bg_color AS bgColor, link_url AS linkUrl, banner_position AS bannerPosition, image_path AS imagePath, sort_order AS sortOrder, start_datetime AS startDatetime, end_datetime AS endDatetime, use_yn AS useYn, reg_date AS regDate FROM banner WHERE banner_position = 'MAIN2' AND use_yn = 'Y' AND (start_datetime IS NULL OR start_datetime <= NOW()) AND (end_datetime IS NULL OR end_datetime >= NOW()) ORDER BY sort_order ASC, banner_no DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.update: UPDATE banner SET banner_name = #{bannerName}, banner_size = #{bannerSize}, bg_color = #{bgColor}, link_url = #{linkUrl}, banner_position = #{bannerPosition}, image_path = #{imagePath}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, start_datetime = #{startDatetime}, end_datetime = #{endDatetime}, use_yn = #{useYn}, reg_date = #{regDate} WHERE banner_no = #{bannerNo}
